cardSubtitle: Soft neoprene material · Waterproof design · Custom logo · OEM bulk orders
logo: Embossed Logo, Silk Screen Printing, Heat Transfer Printing, Custom Logo Method Available
application: Travel, Daily Makeup Storage, Beauty Organization, Toiletry Storage, Promotional Gifts, Retail Sales, Brand Merchandise
title: Lightweight Shockproof Neoprene Cosmetic Bag for Daily & Trip Storage
seoTitle: Quilted Shockproof Neoprene Travel Makeup Pouch for Women
description:
Soft & Durable Neoprene Material
High-quality elastic neoprene surface is gentle on makeup brushes, glass skincare bottles and liquid cosmetics. The fabric resists tearing, stretching and deformation after long-term daily use, no hard edges to scratch your makeup items.
Multi-Layer Quilted Padded Protection
Unique segmented quilting craft adds built-in cushion padding inside the pouch. It effectively buffers bumps and squeezes during flights, road trips or bag storage, preventing broken glass bottles, cracked compacts and bent makeup brushes.
Lightweight & Travel-Friendly Size
Ultra-lightweight construction won’t add extra weight to your handbag, backpack or carry-on luggage. Compact silhouette fits easily inside tote bags and suitcases, perfect for weekend getaways, business trips, gym use and daily office makeup touch-ups.
Stain Resistant & Super Easy to Clean
Waterproof neoprene surface repels foundation spills, oil stains, liquid lipstick and skincare residue. Simply wipe dirt off with a damp cloth, no washing machine required, fast-drying and odor-free.
Exquisite Metal Zipper & Custom Logo Option
Smooth matching metal zipper with mini leather pull tab for seamless opening and closing. We support embossed custom logo printing on the front panel, ideal for beauty brand gifts, salon sets, boutique retail and bulk wholesale private label orders.
seoDescription: Soft padded neoprene makeup bag in matte chocolate brown. Shockproof quilted design, waterproof & easy to clean, lightweight travel cosmetic pouch with custom embossed logo wholesale support.
